summary: Comprehensive testing of Guided Journey app completed successfully. All major features working correctly including landing page, authentication, admin dashboard, user registration, and progress stepper functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Edit/delete buttons not clearly visible or accessible in Steps management

passed_tests: Backend API health check (18/18 endpoints passing)
Landing page loads with navigation (Home, About Us, Partners)
Admin login with admin@example.com / Admin123! redirects to /admin
Admin dashboard Users tab shows user table with role dropdowns
Admin dashboard Steps tab shows 4 default steps
Admin dashboard Partners tab shows 3 sample partners
User registration creates account and redirects to /dashboard
User dashboard shows progress stepper with 4 configurable steps
User dashboard profile form accepts input and can be filled
Partners section on landing page shows 3 partner cards with categories
Navigation between Home, About Us, Partners sections works
API POST /api/auth/register creates user and returns tokens
API GET /api/admin/steps returns 4 steps for admin
API GET /api/partners returns partner list without auth

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor UI improvement needed for admin steps edit/delete buttons)
